title: 2 in 1 Telescopic Window Squeegee with Durable Squeegee Blade and Sponge Attachment - Window Cleaning Kit Perfect to Use as Shower Cleaner Squeegee, Window Cleaner & Car Window Squeegee
features: Flexible Cleaning Solution: This window squeegee with sponge cleaning pad attachment is an extendable window cleaner that is perfect for cleaning shower screens, windows or conservatories. It is a flexible squeegee window cleaner solution that is designed to clean all types of surfaces and is a must-have window cleaning squeegee for any homeowner.

Easy to Use: This window cleaning equipment comes with a double sided squeegee blade and sponge cleaning pad, which is easy to attach and detach. It has an extendable handle that can extend from 33cm up to 48cm, making it easy to clean hard-to-reach areas. This window cleaner extendable tool makes cleaning easier.

Durable and Long-Lasting: The squeegee blade and sponge cleaning pad form part of this extendable shower squeegee. They are made of high-quality materials that are durable and long-lasting. You can use them over and over again, saving you money in the long run. This extendable window cleaning pole squeegee is a worthwhile investment for your home.

Multi-Purpose: This telescopic window cleaner is not only perfect for cleaning windows, car windows, shower screens, and conservatories, but it can also be used for cleaning mirrors, glass doors, and other similar surfaces. It is an all-in-one double sided window cleaner that every homeowner needs.

Efficient Cleaning: The dual sided window cleaner tool squeegee is designed to efficiently clean surfaces, leaving them streak-free and sparkling clean. With this squeegee shower cleaner, you can say goodbye to dirty windows and hello to a clean and bright home or car.

Long before the internet was around, we were talking face to face and exchanging goods while servicing the local community. Now with the Internet we are able to bring this to a much wider audience. What makes our products unique? As we have a heritage going back to 1959, we have a depth of knowledge and skill set which helps us develop new and unique products. Why should you try our products?
